name: Ragdoll Party Online
short_description: Create your own level with your friends online in the sandbox mode, play the mini-games, ragdoll, drive a car, fly with a Jetpack, fart to go higher, throw grenades. Access more than 45 items to build your own level.
detailed_description:
Level Editor

Create your own level, construct building, create gameplay with objectives, place music, create race track and more

Steam Workshop

Share your own level into the Steam Workshop and play to all others levels create by the community.

Online COOP 4 Players

Play with your friends in the mini games and create together levels and gameplay.

8 Mini Games

  • Ragdoll Building Falling
  • Racing
  • Hammer Corridor
  • Fart As you Can
  • Jetpack
  • Giant Ball
  • Spring, Spring, Spring...
  • The Maze

Over 45 items to build and play

- Road Track
- Objective for victory conditions
- Giant Hammer
- Turret
- Mine
- Domino
- Jump Pad
- Fan
- Door
- Black Hole
- Block to build
- Buggy to Drive
- Giant Soccer net
- Giant Soccer Ball
- Music
- A.I.
and more...
